construct_verdict_reason: Two items directly measure family value transmission, but one item measures religious influence on family life, which is a contextual factor rather than the values themselves.

items.reason: Directly measures values learned from family of origin and practiced daily, core to the construct.
Directly measures fundamental values parents should transmit to children, core to the construct.
Measures the influence of religion on family life rather than the values themselves or their transmission—a contextual factor distinct from the construct domain.
